title: Prestige
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Prestige''' was the measure by which students at the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] succeeded. According to [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] teachers such as [[Uthar Wynn]] and [[Yuthura Ban]], Sith students gained prestige by performing great deeds or acquiring valuable [[Sith artifact/Legends|Sith artifacts]] from the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]]. Gaining prestige fostered much competition and cutthroat ruthlessness among the students, ideal qualities of the Sith.

While [[Skirmish on Korriban|infiltrating]] the Sith Academy, [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] had to gain prestige points in order to find the [[Star Map]] hidden inside [[Tomb of Naga Sadow|Naga Sadow's tomb]].

==Behind the scenes==
Possible ways for the player to gain prestige:

*Reciting the [[Code of the Sith/Legends|Code of the Sith]]
*Interrogating a [[Mandalorian prisoner]] to find a weapons cache
*[[Death/Legends|Killing]] [[Thalia May|runaway students]] inside a [[shyrack cave]]
*Destroying or disabling a rogue [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] inside the [[Tomb of Marka Ragnos|tomb]] of [[Marka Ragnos]]
*Uncovering the [[Sword of Ajunta Pall|sword]] of [[Ajunta Pall]]
*Finding a [[Tulak Hord's holocron|Sith holocron]] inside the belly of a [[Tuk'ata/Legends|tuk'ata]] mother
*Killing the hermit in the hills, [[Jorak Uln]] and recovering his [[Jorak Uln's Sith tablet|tablet]]
*Informing Uthar Wynn of Yuthura Ban's plan to overthrow him

It is also possible to pass the trials by killing all your fellow students, but this victory is only a technicality as you are the only survivor: Uthar will award no prestige for this as it is your opponents' failings that allow your success.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}}
